description: Verso: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Last 5 lines only. "...If you can find a fat kid or sheep or myrobalan, please send it to me with him. And write to me with your news and the news of the congregation (may they be blessed). Whatever goods you can obtain, I will be pleased. And peace."
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
